text:
is the 1st chapter of the 1st volume and the 1st chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 A skewed view of life from within the 104th Training Corps. 

Summary

A series of gags in which...

...Eren, Mikasa, and Armin introduce themselves.

...Mikasa makes Eren eat beans.

...Pixis decides that the Female Titan is not good enough to eat him.

...Sasha discovers another use for the anchoring lines in vertical maneuvering equipment.

...Connie calls Bertolt a Titan.

...Krista cannot figure out why boys are avoiding her.

...Jean hires Connie to steal underwear from Mikasa's dresser.

Characters in order of appearance
